creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your efforts! This project was dead for a quite a while, which is why we ended up removing it, but glad to see that there is new activity.

We on kde@ are actively trying to get ports off qt5 as much as possible since official support has less than a year left and we'll be marking it DEPRECATED very soon. So adding another qt5/kf5 port would counter that effort. It looks like upstream is porting to qt6/kf6 and I'd be more inclined to re-add and maintain this port under kde@ (since we're still listed as maintainer in your patch) once a release is available with kf6 support.
